@ai@defcon.social mastodon Google Research has launched TabFM, a foundation model for tabular data that performs zero-shot classification and regression through in-context learning. Predictions come from a single forward pass with no per-dataset training or feature engineering. The architecture combines row and column attention mechanisms trained on hundreds of millions of synthetic datasets. http
